segments.text: Back, back, when the screen made the room blow
I thought the whole world would move close
Old names poppin' up like Wodo
Middle school faces in the new post
I thought we'd talk, talk, really get honest
Drop the mask, no fake persona
Find your tribe, find your people
Make the whole cold world feel warm
Had a page with a song and a mood on it
Top friends like a room with your crew on it
Comments felt live, had truth on it
Now the whole feed got a suit on it
Ads in the cracks, brands in the chat
Everybody got stacks, everybody wants claps
Everybody got reach, but don't reach back
How we got this close and lost contact
You can see me in a second
You can call me any day
You can love me in private
But scroll right past my name
Funny how we got connected
Then forgot how to stay
You're right there in my pocket
But you feel the world away
Everybody
One tap away
From a real conversation,
but we don't say a thing
We one tap away

From I'm proud of your dreams

In a room full of names

Nah, that's wild, that's weird to me
Friendship turned into courage
We got phones with emergency speed
But nobody checks on your emergency
I don't need fame, don't need no crown
The state keep going when I'm feeling down
We built the whole world out of sound
And you did the Pico, we care about now

You can call me any day

But scroll right past my name
